allow: PowerShell(Start-Process python -ArgumentList '-m','http.server','8000' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8000/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("Home page HTTP " + $r.StatusCode\) } catch { Write-Output "ERR home: $_" }; try { $j = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8000/js/products.js' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("products.js HTTP " + $j.StatusCode\) } catch { Write-Output "ERR products: $_" }; try { $i = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8000/images/logo.svg' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("logo.svg HTTP " + $i.StatusCode + " type " + $i.Headers['Content-Type']\) } catch { Write-Output "ERR logo: $_" })
